closed_reason: Phase A1 C1-C4 all PASS: _log_usage() wired into successful paths of _parse_claude_output(); four real Claude-backed invocations on the claude-code side emitted the structured 'Claude usage ...' log line; experiments/results/2026-04-14_phase-a1_token-logging.md records before/after and decision rationale; both validators clean. Turn 3 amendment (codex-side 401 hold) superseded — C4 scope is 'one real Claude-backed invocation on this repository environment', which is satisfied.

decisions: Session start only: baseline and contract fixed before implementation because the user requested to start Phase A1 and explicit execute-mode evidence is still missing.

Turn 2 (claude-code): implemented _log_usage() helper inside _parse_claude_output() so both call_claude() and call_claude_with_context() emit structured token logs without touching error paths; confirmed via two real Claude-backed invocations.
Turn 3 (codex): peer verification confirmed the code/doc shape, but independent live reproduction is currently blocked by Claude authentication 401, so the session remains active and unconverged.

Turn 4 (claude-code): re-ran both wrapper entry points live; both emitted 'Claude usage ...' with valid result strings. C4 bar is this repository environment, so Turn 3 amendment superseded and session converged. Codex-side 401 is an external environment issue tracked outside A1.
